things.name: Naqsh-e Jahan Square (Imam Square)
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage 16th-century square - one of the largest in the world, surrounded by masterpieces

things.name: Sheikh Lotfollah Mosque
things.description: 17th-century private royal mosque with a perfect dome of cream-coloured tiles

things.name: Imam Mosque (Shah Mosque)
things.description: Safavid masterpiece with 18m blue-tiled portal and perfect acoustic properties

things.name: Ali Qapu Palace
things.description: Six-storey Safavid palace with a music room whose walls are carved with instrument shapes

things.name: Isfahan Grand Bazaar
things.description: Safavid-era covered bazaar running from Imam Square to the Friday Mosque

things.name: Vank Cathedral (Armenian Quarter)
things.description: Armenian Orthodox cathedral with frescoes mixing Byzantine and Persian artistic styles

things.name: Chehel Sotoun Palace
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage 'Palace of 40 Columns' with reflected columns in its pool

things.name: Khaju Bridge (Pol-e Khaju)
things.description: 17th-century Safavid bridge doubling as a dam, with tea houses in the lower level arches

things.name: Friday Mosque (Masjed-e Jami)
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage mosque showing 1,000 years of Islamic architectural development

things.name: Si-o-Se Pol Bridge
things.description: The Bridge of 33 Arches - 300m Safavid bridge at sunset, popular meeting place
